name: Gladia
description: Gladia v2 speech-to-text API for pre-recorded transcription, uploads, diarization, translation, summarization, subtitles, sentiment, NER, PII redaction, and custom metadata.

tools.name: upload_audio_url
tools.description: Ask Gladia to ingest an audio/video URL and return a Gladia audio_url usable by create_transcription.

audio_url.description: Publicly reachable audio or video URL.

tools.name: upload_audio_file
tools.description: Upload an audio/video file to Gladia and return a Gladia audio_url usable by create_transcription.

audio.description: Audio/video file content as blobref://, base64, data URL, or raw string.

audio_filename.description: Optional filename for the multipart upload.

tools.name: create_transcription
tools.description: Initiate a Gladia v2 pre-recorded transcription. Use audio_url from upload_audio_url/upload_audio_file or an external URL. Optional add-ons include diarization, subtitles, translation, summarization, NER, sentiment, PII redaction, audio_to_llm, sentences, and custom metadata.

tools.name: create_transcription_raw
tools.description: Initiate a Gladia pre-recorded transcription with a raw request body. Use this when the standard tool schema does not expose a new Gladia option yet.

tools.name: list_transcriptions
tools.description: List Gladia pre-recorded transcriptions with pagination, date, status, and metadata filters.

tools.name: get_transcription
tools.description: Get a Gladia pre-recorded transcription status, parameters, and result. Result is available when status is done.

tools.name: download_audio
tools.description: Download the audio file used by a Gladia pre-recorded transcription.

tools.name: delete_transcription
tools.description: Delete a Gladia pre-recorded transcription and all related data.

events.name: transcription.created
events.description: A Gladia pre-recorded transcription was created.

events.name: transcription.success
events.description: A Gladia pre-recorded transcription completed successfully.

registration.manual_setup: Gladia callbacks are configured per transcription request with callback=true and callback_config.url. This integration does not auto-register a global webhook.
